prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-3DPATKNIF-GRY Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: ASR Tactical Thumb Assisted Drop Point Serrated Pocket Knife 3D Pattern 4.75 In Description: The ASR Tactical 3D metal pattern pocket knife is an ideal everyday carry tool. It features a drop point blade that is great for various uses including chopping, woodworking, and general utility work.

This compact camping tool folds down to just 4.75" in length, and features a 3.5" blade length once unfolded. It comes with a convenient metal pocket clip so you can easily store it in your pocket or on your belt for quick deployment and safe storage when not in use.

The blade itself is made of durable, high-quality stainless steel that won't rust so you can count on it in any weather situation. The handle is sturdy plastic and features an ergonomic grip to help prevent slippage during slicing and cutting.

These pocket knives have a lockback design to keep the blade safe when in your pocket and not in use. Lockback knives offer reliable strength, ambidextrous operation, and safety. They were designed to be compact and lightweight, weighing just 5 ounces so they won't add bulk.

Pocket knives are versatile tools that can be used for everyday purposes like opening packages safely. Make sure to grab one of these for yourself or a friend who can't go anywhere without a compact and reliable pocket knife. Search Terms: lockback pocket knife metal clip stainless steel blade camping emergency fishing hiking hunting knives blades drop point folding edc knives Features: - ESSENTIAL EDC POCKET KNIFE - ASR Tactical pocket knife is ideal for everyday carry, but is also a reliable tool for camping, hunting, boating, and more. Count on it for other utility work like woodworking and chopping. - DROP POINT BLADE - This pocket knife features a stainless steel drop point blade so it won't rust regardless of the weather. It comes with a metal pocket clip so you can store it safely in your pocket or on your belt for quick deployment - LOCKBACK DESIGN - These knives feature a lockback design to keep your blade safe when not in use. This style of pocket knife offers ambidextrous operation, added safety, and reliable durability. The blade features a sturdy plastic 3d metal pattern handle with an ergonomic grip to prevent slippage during use. - LIGHTWEIGHT AND COMPACT - ASR Tactical pocket knife folds down to just 4.75", with a blade length of 3.5". It weighs just 5 ounces so it won't add bulk to your gear - SPECIFICATIONS - Materials: plastic, stainless steel, metal; Colors: 3D pattern metal, chrome, black; Blade length: 3.5"; Foldable length: 4.75"; Unfolded length: 8.25"; Weight: 5.12oz (.12lbs); Ergonomic handle; Blade type: drop point === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Tactical 4.75in 3D Pattern Drop Point Pocket Knife

openai.item_name: ASR Tactical 4.75 In 3D Pattern Drop Point Pocket Knife

anthropic.title_differentiation: Lockback Design, Stainless Steel Blade, Metal Clip, Ergonomic Grip, EDC, Camping, Hiking, Hunting

openai.title_differentiation: Stainless Steel Serrated Blade, Lockback Safety, Metal Pocket Clip, Ergonomic Grip, Lightweight EDC, Camping Utility
